title: Fix hierarchical verilation for projects with dot-f dependency lists (#5199)
body:
This PR fixes hierarchical verilation for projects that manage their dependencies via file dependency lists. Previously, only files listed in the command line (vFiles) were appended to hierarchical children causing linking errors and missing top module files in hierarchical children verilation in such projects.

I'd attached a test case that utilizes file lists as well as validates that header files are included only once.
